reviews.title: Great value
reviews.body: Excellent wheels and build quality for the price.

reviews.title: Good but slightly heavy
reviews.body: Handle is sturdy but the suitcase adds a bit of weight.

reviews.title: Very stylish
reviews.body: Design is great and wheels are very smooth.

reviews.title: Zipper issue
reviews.body: Zipper broke after two trips. Very disappointed.

reviews.title: Best in class
reviews.body: Extremely durable material and great space distribution.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.body: Little bit expensive but you pay for the quality.

reviews.title: Decent
reviews.body: Good enough for budget travelers. Wheels are okay.

reviews.title: Handle feels flimsy
reviews.body: The telescopic handle feels like it might break if fully loaded.

reviews.title: Super budget option
reviews.body: I didn't expect much but it's held up well on two flights.

reviews.title: Lightweight
reviews.body: Very easy to carry and the wheels are good on smooth surfaces.

reviews.title: Beautiful design
reviews.body: Stunning looks and the material feels premium. Wheels are smooth.

reviews.title: Good hardshell
reviews.body: Durable and survives rough handling at airports.
